# terrible_community_general_xdg_mime (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `handler` (String) Sets the default handler for the specified MIME types. The desktop file must be installed in the system. If the desktop file is not installed, the module does not fail, but the handler is not set either. You must pass a handler in the form `*.desktop`, otherwise the module fails.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `mime_types` (String) One or more MIME types for which a default handler is set.

### Read-Only

- `current_handlers` (String) Currently set handlers for the passed MIME types.
- `version` (String) Version of the `xdg-mime` tool.
